## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Town and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO progress, and team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Darrell is leaving GrowthX; Kyle Gaudreau is taking over, bringing extensive growth and digital marketing experience](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Content production is on track with 4 articles published, 6 in review, and 5 more planned](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Early SEO metrics show promising upward trajectory in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [GrowthX is implementing an LLM-friendly content strategy, with potential for experimentation on Town's site](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes and Introductions

  - [Darrell is leaving GrowthX at the end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Kyle Gaudreau introduced as Darrell's replacement](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [Extensive background: 20+ years in digital and growth](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [Former GrowthX customer, helped build delivery side of business](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [Specializes in diversifying channels beyond paid search](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [4 new articles published since last meeting](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [6 articles in various stages of review](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [5 more articles planned for next batch by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Consistent publishing cadence established](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

### SEO Performance Metrics

  - [Impressions showing upward trajectory since August 8th](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - ["FIRPTA Compliance Guide for Real Estate Professionals" article:](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [Generated initial traffic: 2 clicks from 30 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
      - [7% click-through rate, considered very good](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Workflow Improvements

  - [Ludmilla provided helpful resources for accuracy in article numbers](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Addressing issues with internal and external linking](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Aim to prevent linking to 404 pages](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### LLM-Friendly Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX team working on implementing LLM.txt file](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Current approach:](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [Distills top 25-30 most trafficked/clicked landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [Creates simplified version in LLM-friendly format (e.g., Markdown)](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Discussed potential for "shadow blog" approach:](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [Not indexed by Google, but accessible to AI models](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [Uses H1 tags for common industry questions](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [Concise answers in paragraph form](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
      - [Heavy use of bullet points and lists](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Exploration of methods to gather relevant questions:](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
      - [Partnerships with LLM monitoring companies](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Using tools like Perplexity to analyze social media discussions](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [Leveraging customer call data for real-world questions](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pier to review and publish 4-5 articles this week](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement initial LLM.txt file strategy this week](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Darrell to clarify Town's proposed LLM approach with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Next meeting: GrowthX to present LLM.txt implementation for review](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Kyle and Pier to schedule separate discussion on broader content strategy and potential collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/oh4U5cXusUPCa7BEWNgPyosdhNxzHXDB?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
